services.name: nirholas/agenti
services.description: Give AI agents access to money. Manage finances, trade cryptocurrency. MCP server for AI agents to interact with 20+ blockchains. 380+ tools for DeFi, DEX aggregation, security scanning, cross-chain bridges, QR payments. x402 enabled - AI agents can autonomously pay for premium APIs and trade with other agents. Works with Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor.
